name: geo-content-writer
description: A Content Writer Skill backed by a CLI runtime. Turn Dageno GEO opportunity data into content packs and writing-ready assets by combining response evidence, citation evidence, prompt fanout, keyword demand, structured asset decisions, and a project-level brand knowledge base.

seo_metrics_api.recommended_provider: any approved search volume and keyword difficulty API

serp_retrieval.recommended_provider: approved SERP API or user-provided export

metadata.minimum_permissions: Dageno API access required; SEO metrics, page fetch, and SERP enrichment are optional connectors.
metadata.data_access_policy: This skill is optimized for opportunity-driven content packs from Dageno opportunities. It also reads a project-level brand knowledge base from knowledge/brand/brand-knowledge-base.json unless the caller supplies another path. Do not assume hidden access to private search APIs, page crawlers, or Google scraping. Keep prompt fanout, SEO enrichment, and future landing-page branches visible even when their connectors are not yet supplied.
